name: n8n-nodes-openmrs
description: n8n community node for OpenMRS FHIR R4 integration. Access patient demographics, encounters, observations, diagnostic reports, conditions, and medication statements.

scripts.copy-assets: node -e "const fs=require('fs'); const path=require('path'); const src='nodes/OpenMrs/openMrs.svg'; const dest='dist/nodes/OpenMrs/openMrs.svg'; fs.mkdirSync(path.dirname(dest), {recursive:true}); fs.copyFileSync(src, dest); const credSrc='credentials/openMrs.svg'; const credDest='dist/credentials/openMrs.svg'; fs.mkdirSync(path.dirname(credDest), {recursive:true}); fs.copyFileSync(credSrc, credDest);"
